name: 03_gold_analytics_pipeline
description: Gold layer analytics: computes KPIs, detects anomalies, runs simulations, checks compliance, generates recommendations, calculates GHG scope emissions + CRREM pathway, and runs HVAC envelope analytics. GHG and HVAC engines run after KPI; CRREM pathway loader runs in parallel (static reference data).

activities.name: Load_CRREM_Pathway
activities.description: Run 10_crrem_pathway_loader — loads CRREM 2°C / 1.5°C decarbonization pathway reference data into gold_crrem_pathway. Static reference table: building_type × country_code × pathway_year (2020–2050). No dependency — runs in parallel at pipeline start.

activities.name: Compute_KPIs
activities.description: Run 03_kpi_engine — computes daily and monthly KPIs (EUI, COP, solar yield, battery SoC, carbon intensity) into gold_kpi_daily and gold_kpi_monthly.

activities.name: Detect_Anomalies
activities.description: Run anomaly_detection — rule-based anomaly checks (consumption spikes, COP degradation, solar underperformance, after-hours waste) into gold_anomalies.

activities.name: Run_Simulation_Engine
activities.description: Run 04_simulation_engine — physics-based what-if simulations (heat pump, solar, battery, insulation) with ROI and grant calculations into gold_simulation_results.

activities.name: Run_GHG_Scope_Engine
activities.description: Run 09_ghg_scope_engine — computes monthly GHG emissions per building into gold_ghg_scope. Scope 1 (gas + diesel), Scope 2 location/market, Scope 3 estimated (8% rule). Depends on gold_kpi_daily (Compute_KPIs output) + silver_building_master. Delta MERGE UPSERT — idempotent.

activities.name: Check_Compliance
activities.description: Run 05_compliance_checker — scores buildings against EnEfG, GEG, EEG, EPBD, CSRD, BEP-TR regulations (0-100 per regulation, weighted overall) into gold_compliance_results and gold_compliance_issues.

activities.name: Generate_Recommendations
activities.description: Run 06_recommendation_engine — synthesizes KPI trends, compliance scores, and simulation ROI into ranked, trilingual recommendations (top 8 per building) into gold_recommendations.

activities.name: Run_HVAC_Analytics
activities.description: Run 11_hvac_analytics_engine — monthly HVAC energy disaggregation (EN ISO 13790 HDD/CDD model), envelope heat loss (EN ISO 13370), insulation score vs GEG 2023 benchmarks, rolling SCOP, HVAC efficiency score (0–100), and renovation priority matrix. Output: gold_hvac_analytics (Delta MERGE UPSERT + Z-ORDER). Depends on gold_kpi_daily (Compute_KPIs) and gold_ghg_scope (Run_GHG_Scope_Engine — used for carbon context, soft dependency).
activities._note: GHG dependency is soft (Succeeded OR Failed) — gold_hvac_analytics does not require GHG data to run. GHG scope columns are joined as enrichment only. Heat loss and insulation scores use silver_building_master + gold_kpi_daily.

activities.name: Gold_Completed
activities.description: All gold analytics finished — anomaly detection, recommendation pipeline, GHG scope engine, CRREM pathway loader, and HVAC analytics all done.
